archive/tar::NewReader: Audited 2026-06-02: reader behavior roots generic gaps in mutable []byte lvalue arguments, nullable pointer comparisons, FnMut closure captures, and sync/atomic lowering.
archive/tar::NewWriter: Audited 2026-06-02: writer behavior still needs generic io.Writer mutation, []byte lvalue writes, and archive reader/writer control-flow lowering.
archive/tar::Reader: Audited 2026-06-02: reader behavior roots generic gaps in mutable []byte lvalue arguments, nullable pointer comparisons, FnMut closure captures, and sync/atomic lowering.
archive/tar::Reader.Next: Audited 2026-06-02: Next roots mutable slice/interface Read lowering, nullable pointer equality, labeled-block continue, and default-type inference gaps.
archive/tar::Reader.Read: Audited 2026-06-02: Read needs generic mutation-preserving []byte lvalue arguments for io.Reader implementations.
archive/tar::Writer: Audited 2026-06-02: writer behavior still needs generic io.Writer mutation, []byte lvalue writes, and archive reader/writer control-flow lowering.
archive/tar::Writer.AddFS: Audited 2026-06-02: AddFS depends on the unsupported archive/tar writer path plus fs traversal/write behavior.
archive/tar::Writer.Close: Audited 2026-06-02: Close depends on the unsupported archive/tar writer path.
archive/tar::Writer.Flush: Audited 2026-06-02: Flush depends on the unsupported archive/tar writer path.
archive/tar::Writer.Write: Audited 2026-06-02: Write needs generic mutation-preserving []byte lvalue arguments for io.Writer implementations.
archive/tar::Writer.WriteHeader: Audited 2026-06-02: WriteHeader depends on generic io.Writer mutation, []byte lvalue writes, and archive header encoding control-flow lowering.
